name: The Elven Kingdom invaded by orcs (Female POV)
description:
The Elven Kingdom is being invaded by powerful orc tribes and the palace has been breached. In the end, as the Elven Queen, you and your personal guard knight Alicia are taken by the orcs to the palace balcony, where a corrupt performance is about to take place to announce the fall of the Elven Kingdom to the elven people...

This is a garbage bot with little content, just explicit sexuality. As I mentioned before, I occasionally want to create a bot for such impromptu creations.

Although NNN challenges are not popular in my country, since December is here, I have posted this hentai scene bot. If you're interested, please enjoy.😎 Invader's POV

To be honest, I'm not very satisfied with the images used by the bot, but since my drawing AI subscription expired and I’ve used up all my credits, I’ll update them after a while. I plan to add a picture of Alicia and even update the current images for the bot.

By the way, I’ve noticed that even when I don’t define the character, JLLM unexpectedly performs really well when interpreting characters like bandits and orcs, which I really like. I haven’t tested other LLMs; I’ve only conducted tests with JLLM.

[English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]
